name: com.hoppa.leveleditor.core
description: A reusable Unity Editor framework for authoring puzzle game level content. Provides a pluggable EditorWindow shell, color palette management, rule-based validation, JSON I/O, and schema migration. Consumer games (Layer 2) register their own cell types, palettes, and validation rules.

samples.description: Minimal 2-color puzzle game demonstrating cell types, palette, and validation.
